subject: [DOC] Fix doc-rules build
commit_message:
[DOC] Fix doc-rules build

Doc-rules build is failing due to changes expected in .readthedocs.yaml
file.  Updated this file as needed to pass that build.

Issue-ID: DOC-811
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: Id072195a06178824803d5550ddbcaf3949c03d8b
(cherry picked from commit 4a456750a2741d03f022abe292e9d17d84dcb9e0)
